name: advanced_circuit_ret_plus_three_trunks
notes: 5-seed cluster at (10..14, 161): electronic-circuit return flow crossing three south-flowing iron-plate trunks (plus adjacent copper-cable and plastic-bar trunks). Exercises the region solver's multi-spec junction handling. Guards against clustering regressions for this shape, which previously fragmented into sub-clusters and capped the growth loop.
